title: P31 Labs Bug Bounty Report
description: Schema for a verified security vulnerability report in the P31 Labs responsible disclosure program.

submittedAt.description: ISO 8601 date the report was received

reporter.description: Researcher handle or null for anonymous reports

cvss.description: CVSS 3.1 base score, null for egg-class findings

k4Vertex.description: K₄ vertex classification: ψ₁ physical, ψ₂ network, ψ₃ compliance, ψ₄ UX/trust

scope.description: Affected URL or endpoint, e.g. https://phosphorus31.org/donate/

title.description: Short description of the vulnerability for public display

fixedAt.description: ISO 8601 date the fix was deployed, null if not yet fixed

reward.description: USD reward paid, null if not yet determined

glassBoxRef.description: Glass Box transparency URL for the fix, null if not yet published

cve.description: CVE identifier if assigned, otherwise null

disclosureDate.description: Coordinated disclosure date, null if not scheduled

hofEntry.description: Whether the researcher is listed in the Hall of Fame
